name: Ephedrine
executiveSummary: Mixed sympathomimetic agent for intraoperative hypotension and historical use in bronchospasm.
indications:
## Indications

- Hypotension during spinal/epidural anesthesia.
- Bradycardia with hypotension in an anesthetic context.

## Precautions

- Tachycardia, hypertension. Limited use in ischemic heart disease.

> Adjust according to institutional protocols and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 5–10 mg IV bolus; repeat every 3–5 min.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. ACLS / PALS / NRP Guidelines.
ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Society of Critical Care Medicine (SCCM). ICU medication guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
